ootb
Restaurant · F&B · 30 Year Brand
Calypso Hut
How a beloved full-service restaurant with 30 years of brand presence scaled revenue by 47% and transformed into a data-powered, expansion-ready brand.

The Challenge

Calypso Hut had built a loyal customer base over 30 years, but the brand had not evolved with the market. Marketing was fragmented, data was not being tracked, and the business lacked a clear growth strategy to support expansion beyond its flagship location.

Our Approach

OOTB conducted a full business diagnostic — analyzing customer data, marketing spend, menu performance, and operational flow. We identified that the brand had strong emotional equity but lacked the infrastructure to scale it systematically.

We redesigned the marketing system from the ground up: launching a new CRM, building automated campaigns, refreshing the brand identity, and creating a content engine that reached new customers while deepening loyalty with existing ones.

The Results

Within 12 months, Calypso Hut saw a 47% increase in revenue, a measurable increase in repeat visits, and built the operational foundation for a second location. The brand is now positioned as a scalable, data-driven restaurant concept.

📸 Additional client images — send us your photos to add here

Results at a Glance

  • 47%
    Revenue increase in 12 months
  • 30+
    Years of brand history leveraged
  • 2x
    Repeat visit rate improvement

ootb
QSR Franchise · 75+ Locations
Mr. Puffs
Building a 3-year growth roadmap, unifying franchise operations, and creating KPI dashboards for 75+ locations across Canada.

The Challenge

Mr. Puffs had grown rapidly to 75+ franchise locations, but that growth had come with operational inconsistency. Franchisees were running disconnected marketing, brand standards varied by location, and leadership had no centralized view of performance across the network.

Our Approach

We began with a comprehensive franchise audit, speaking with franchisees, reviewing marketing materials, and analyzing location-level sales data. From there, OOTB built a unified franchise growth playbook — covering brand standards, marketing execution templates, and a centralized KPI dashboard.

We also developed a 3-year strategic roadmap that mapped out territory expansion, franchise recruitment targets, and revenue milestones for the network as a whole.

The Results

Franchisees now operate from a unified marketing playbook. Leadership has real-time visibility across all locations. The 3-year roadmap is actively being executed, with new territory openings ahead of schedule.

📸 Additional client images — send us your photos to add here

Results at a Glance

  • 75+
    Franchise locations unified
  • 3yr
    Strategic growth roadmap
  • 100%
    KPI visibility across network

ootb
Creative Studio · Toronto
Stone Studios
Transforming a 5000 sq ft kitchen renovations warehouse into Toronto's premier "third space" content studio for creatives.

The Challenge

Stone Studios had an incredible physical asset — a 5000 sq ft warehouse with stunning architectural finishes — but no clear market positioning, no client acquisition strategy, and no brand identity that communicated its unique value to Toronto's creative community.

Our Approach

OOTB developed a full brand strategy for Stone Studios, positioning it as a "third space" — not just a studio rental, but a creative home for Toronto's boldest talent. We built the brand identity, website, social media presence, and a B2B outreach strategy targeting production companies, agencies, and content creators.

We also designed a tiered membership model that created recurring revenue alongside one-off bookings.

The Results

Stone Studios launched with a fully differentiated brand, a waitlist of interested clients, and a clear path to profitability through its membership and day-rate model.

📸 Additional client images — send us your photos to add here

  • 100%

ootb
B2B Medical · Healthcare
MC Medical Sales
Turning 25+ years of industry experience into a leading B2B medical device consultancy through branding, strategic partnerships, and thought leadership.

The Challenge

MC Medical Sales had 25+ years of relationships and expertise in the medical device space, but their brand did not reflect the depth of that experience. They were operating primarily through word-of-mouth with no digital presence, no formal partnership strategy, and no thought leadership content.

Our Approach

OOTB repositioned MC Medical Sales as a premium B2B consultancy — developing a new brand identity, launching a professional digital presence, and building a content strategy that positioned their leadership as trusted voices in the medical device industry.

We also identified and pursued strategic partnerships with device manufacturers, creating a formal referral and distribution network that added new revenue streams.

The Results

MC Medical Sales is now recognized as a thought leader in the North American medical device consulting space, with new partnership agreements signed and a growing inbound lead pipeline driven by content.

ootb
Respiratory Care · PEI · Acquisition
Maritime Asthma
Supporting a 15+ year old respiratory care company through an acquisition and full rebrand — now one of PEI's most loved healthcare brands.

The Challenge

Maritime Asthma had served patients in Prince Edward Island for over 15 years, but the business was undergoing a major ownership transition through acquisition. The new owners needed to preserve the brand's community trust while modernizing the business for a new era of healthcare delivery.

Our Approach

OOTB guided the brand through a careful, community-centered rebrand — maintaining the equity of the Maritime Asthma name while evolving the visual identity, patient communication strategy, and digital presence to reflect the new ownership's vision.

We worked closely with the team to ensure existing patients felt continuity of care while new patients discovered a modern, trustworthy brand. We also built out referral pathways with local physicians and healthcare providers.

The Results

Maritime Asthma successfully navigated the acquisition transition with no patient attrition. The rebrand was well-received by the community, and the new brand is now recognized as one of PEI's most trusted healthcare providers.

📸 Additional client images — send us your photos to add here

Results at a Glance

  • 15+
    Years of brand equity preserved
  • 0%
    Patient attrition during transition
  • #1
    Trusted healthcare brand, PEI

ootb
Co-Working · Real Estate · Canada
Venture X Canada
How a premium co-working brand achieved near-full occupancy and national recognition through a unified growth strategy.

The Challenge

Venture X Canada was entering a highly competitive co-working market dominated by global brands. Despite having premium facilities and a strong global franchise system behind them, the Canadian locations were struggling to differentiate themselves and fill desks.

Our Approach

OOTB developed a market positioning strategy that leaned into Venture X's premium differentiators — the design, the community, the flexibility. We built a local marketing engine tailored to each location's surrounding business ecosystem, targeting SMBs, remote workers, and enterprise satellite teams.

We also launched a member referral program, built out the content marketing calendar, and optimized the sales conversion funnel from tour booking to signed membership.

The Results

Venture X Canada achieved near-full occupancy across locations and built a national brand presence that set the standard for premium co-working in Canada.

📸 Additional client images — send us your photos to add here

Results at a Glance

  • 95%
    Occupancy rate achieved
  • National
    Brand recognition built
  • 3x
    Lead flow improvement

Flagship Program

OOTB Genesis

Our most comprehensive business transformation program — for brands ready to make a generational leap.

About the Program

Built for Brands at an Inflection Point

A deeply integrated engagement combining strategy, brand, operations, and data into a unified growth engine.

Genesis

by OOTB

Program Structure

How Genesis Works

01

Discovery & Diagnostic

Deep-dive audit of your business — financials, operations, brand, marketing, and customer data.

02

Strategy & Roadmap

Custom 12-month strategic roadmap with quarterly milestones, KPI targets, and resource allocation.

03

Brand Architecture

Complete brand system — positioning, visual identity, messaging hierarchy, and go-to-market narrative.

04

Marketing System Build

Full omnichannel infrastructure — CRM, automation, content engine, paid media, SEO, and dashboards.

05

Operations & Systems

Operational playbook, team structure optimization, tech stack integration, and process automation.

06

Data & Optimization

Ongoing tracking, monthly reporting, predictive modeling, and continuous optimization for growth.

Ready to Begin?

Apply for OOTB Genesis

Genesis cohorts are limited to ensure quality. Apply today to begin your transformation.
